---
title: &TITLE Yiming Gan
last: Gan
first: Yiming
people_group: alumni
education: Ph.D. | University of Rochester | 2023
current_pos: Professor | Institute of Computing Technologies, Chinese Academy of Sciences
subtitle: Former Ph.D. Student
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/pubs/*.qmd"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - text: Website
      icon: house
      href: https://yiminggan.com/
---

<hr>


:::{#about}



## Education
{{< meta education >}}<br>
[Dissertation](https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/GanDissertation2023.pdf): Improving Fault Tolerance of Computing Systems for Autonomous Machines

## Current Position
{{< meta current_pos >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
